scripts.render:webm: npx remotion render src/index.ts InstructionHierarchy ../docs/videos/instruction-hierarchy.webm --pixel-format yuva420p && npx remotion render src/index.ts RoutingDecision ../docs/videos/routing-decision.webm --pixel-format yuva420p && npx remotion render src/index.ts OnDemandLoading ../docs/videos/on-demand-loading.webm --pixel-format yuva420p
scripts.render:mp4: npx remotion render src/index.ts InstructionHierarchyDark ../docs/videos/instruction-hierarchy.mp4 && npx remotion render src/index.ts RoutingDecisionDark ../docs/videos/routing-decision.mp4 && npx remotion render src/index.ts OnDemandLoadingDark ../docs/videos/on-demand-loading.mp4
scripts.render: npm run render:webm && npm run render:mp4
